caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, a headset, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVE DO SHIT" sits before a professional microphone in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall. In the background, a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt and a clothing rack are visible. Small logos reading "THE REALITY TALK" appear in the lower-left and lower-right corners of the scene. As the video progresses, the man speaks, his mouth moving and his head shifting slightly. His left arm is visible, gesturing slightly as he talks. The background remains static, and the camera angle stays fixed on him in a medium shot. He continues to look slightly to his left while talking into the microphone, maintaining a consistent expression throughout the sequence.
